summary: The engine labels a real backfill run, preserves comment independence, writes current_label pointers, and persists fallback labels when AI output is missing.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Batch labeling persists labels
checks.command: sqlite query on content_labels for run-755de99fc7
checks.actual: content_labels has 77 rows for run-755de99fc7 under one label_job_id

checks.name: CHECK-02: Comments labeled independently
checks.command: sqlite query comparing COMMENT label role vs parent POST label role
checks.expected: Comment labels may differ from parent post labels
checks.actual: 11 comment records on run-755de99fc7 have author_role different from their parent post label

checks.name: CHECK-03: AI error -> fallback persists
checks.command: temporary SQLite smoke with StubAI returning empty records
checks.expected: Fallback label is stored and job becomes PARTIAL
checks.actual: Fallback smoke produced job status=PARTIAL, content_labels=('unknown','fallback','ai_missing_record_output'), crawled_posts.label_status=FALLBACK

checks.name: CHECK-04: Current label pointers updated
checks.actual: 77 crawled_posts on run-755de99fc7 have current_label_id not null

checks.name: CHECK-05: Batch call is not 1 request/record
checks.actual: Live summary progressed from 0 to 20 to 77 labeled records, indicating grouped batch processing rather than one request per record
